Off Calendar Mar-24-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances in Open Court. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

Defendant Lauriedale HOA's Motion For Change Of Venue To San Mateo County Superior Court is GRANTED.

Good cause appearing and the parties agreeing, this action is transferred to San Mateo Superior Court.

Moving Party to pay costs of transfer.

Moving Party is ordered to prepare a proposed order consistent with the above and email it to contestdept302tr@sftc.org prior to the time set for hearing.

Order is signed.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default
Off Calendar Dec-31-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Elizabeth Karnazes 650-667-1370 Plaintiff in Pro Per.
Gary Ciero, Esq. 925-357-3456 Lewis Brisbois Bisgaard & Smith LLP for Defendant.

Parties state appearance. The Court announces the tentative ruling. The Court states a timely notice of contest the TR was received.

ARGUED. The Court announces TR is granted since Defendant submitted a proposed motion to change venue which was included in the declaration. Mr. Cerio submits to the TR. Ms. Karnazes presents arguments. The Court comments. Mr. Cerio responds. Court commentsThe Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentative ruling with modification striking out language.

Defendant Lauriedale Homeowners Association's Motion To Set Aside Entry Of Default is GRANTED.

Order is signed. (see order for full details) Mr. Cerio to comply with CCP 1019.5.
